corpusAuthority.slice: Records from the immutable held-out corpus whose hubId, effectivePolicyHash, generation, and riskSlice.id equal the certificate candidate bindings.
corpusAuthority.thresholdRule: A score-to-risk threshold may be promoted only from risk and coverage measured on this bound held-out slice. Fleet-wide constants and in-sample router output are inadmissible.

metrics.name: coverage
metrics.numerator: Bound slice records on which the candidate threshold emits route.
metrics.denominator: All admissible records in the bound held-out slice.

metrics.name: selectiveRisk
metrics.numerator: Incorrect route decisions among bound slice records on which the candidate threshold emits route.
metrics.denominator: Bound slice records on which the candidate threshold emits route; undefined when coverage is zero and therefore not promotable.

metrics.name: optionRecall
metrics.numerator: Clarify-eligible bound slice records whose gold legal local target appears among the emitted candidate options.
metrics.denominator: Bound slice records whose gold action is clarify and whose label identifies a legal local target.

metrics.name: clarificationResolution
metrics.numerator: Clarified bound slice records whose single accepted answer resolves after exactly one rescore to the labeled route or labeled no-match.
metrics.denominator: Bound slice records on which clarify is emitted and an answer is accepted or none_of_these is selected.

metrics.name: cancelDecline
metrics.numerator: Clarified bound slice records answered with none_of_these, explicit decline, or cancellation.
metrics.denominator: Bound slice records on which clarify is emitted.

metrics.name: addedTurns
metrics.numerator: Sum of user turns introduced by the controller across the bound slice.
metrics.denominator: All admissible records in the bound held-out slice.

metrics.name: cardSize
metrics.numerator: Sum of deterministic contract-token counts for emitted decision cards across the bound slice.
metrics.denominator: Bound slice records on which a decision card is emitted.
metrics.unit: mean contract tokens per emitted card
